name: Stewart's Salad
recipeIngredient: 20 oz. crushed pineapple in its own juice, drained
1 package Lite Dream Whip, made with skim milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix Jell-O, food coloring, and drained pineapple in a bowl.
2. Pour the mixture into a 9 x 13-inch pan and chill until firm.
3. Blend the cream cheese and Dream Whip together in another bowl.
4. Spread the blended mixture over the chilled Jell-O layer.
5. Chill again.
6. Cook the third-layer ingredients (pineapple juice, flour, egg yolks, and Equal) until thick.
7. Cool the cooked mixture.
8. Drop spoonfuls of the cooled mixture over the second layer.
9. Spread carefully.
10. Keep chilled until ready to serve.
Nutrients per serving: Equal, Calories 114, Fat 5 g, Cholesterol 42 mg, Carbohydrate 12 g, Sodium 129 mg.
Exchanges: Fruit 1, Fat 1/2.
